programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 must rescue an alien world from the Goa'uld -- with help from an unexpected source. Teal'c seeks revenge on the System Lord Cronus for the murder of his father.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver
programme.desc: Main story: how desperate the American law enforcement is to make money out of everyone by using the process called the "civil asset forfeiture," and how it would make for a weird episode of "Law and Order." Plus, John wants to host the 2022 Winter Olympics and how is Columbus Day still a thing.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Reluctantly designated as the heir to the land of Far, Far Away, Shrek hatches a plan to install the rebellious Artie as the new king while Princess Fiona tries to fend off a coup d'état by the jilted Prince Charming.

programme.title: My Little Pony: Friendship Is Magic
programme.desc: When Rarity surprises Sweetie Belle by spending a day together doing all of her favorite activities, Rarity must learn that her little sister, having grown and changed is no longer the little foal that she is used to be.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day of the competition and the B&B owners meet for the last time. Tensions mount as Gordon and Sharon delve in to their noise and lack of privacy issues at The Castle Hotel.
